Risk Description: Because of repeated defect reopenings and multiple QA retesting cycles observed in JIRA and confirmed by ~3-4% defect leakage in Metrics Report, there is a risk that quality assurance efforts are being stretched, which could lead to financial loss and delayed delivery.

Because of recurring environment and access permission dependencies causing blocked tasks in JIRA and elevated cycle times (5-6 days) in Metrics Report, there is a risk that key deliverables will be delayed, which could lead to SLA breach and delayed go-live.

Because of persistent PR approval delays seen in JIRA (multiple tasks with status 'Blocked' or 'In Progress' due to PR approval) and confirmed by Metrics Report as a source of elevated cycle times, there is a risk that development throughput will be constrained, which could lead to missed sprint commitments and quality issues.
